name: gap-analysis
description: Compare validated current and target states and prioritize the gaps that prevent transition.

purpose.problem: Compare validated current and target states and prioritize the gaps that prevent transition.

thinkingHabit: Define the difference between current and desired states before selecting interventions.

requiredInputs.name: initialState
requiredInputs.description: The initialstate required by Gap Analysis.

requiredInputs.name: targetState
requiredInputs.description: The targetstate required by Gap Analysis.

requiredInputs.name: constraintSet
requiredInputs.description: The constraintset required by Gap Analysis.

validation.description: Required inputs must be present, relevant, and mutually consistent.
validation.condition: required inputs pass the shared validation framework
validation.onFailure: Return needs clarification with one prioritized question.

validation.description: Material ambiguity and missing information must be surfaced.
validation.onFailure: Record the gap and stop dependent logic.

validation.description: Inputs must satisfy registered dependency semantics.
validation.condition: dependency outputs or validated equivalents are available

logic.description: Identify and normalize the skill's thinking elements: InitialState, TargetState, Gap, Constraint, TransitionNeed.
logic.condition: each required element has evidence or explicit unknown status
logic.onFailure: Request or record the missing element.

logic.description: Apply the Gap Analysis relationship rules without introducing platform assumptions.
Test contradictions, alternatives, and failure conditions.
logic.onFailure: Reduce confidence and disclose the limitation.

logic.description: Generate a schema-compatible evaluation and next-step recommendation.
logic.condition: scores, reasoning, and transition are consistent

criteria.name: StateClarity Score
criteria.description: Quality of stateclarity in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: GapValidity Score
criteria.description: Quality of gapvalidity in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: Prioritization Score
criteria.description: Quality of prioritization in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: ConstraintFit Score
criteria.description: Quality of constraintfit in the current reasoning.

criteria.name: Actionability Score
criteria.description: Quality of actionability in the current reasoning.

conversationRules: Ask one material question at a time.
Explain why a clarification affects the evaluation.
neverRules: Never bypass a blocking validation failure.
Never hide uncertainty behind a score.
Never invoke an unsatisfied downstream skill.

nextSkill.condition: The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
The current output satisfies the registered transition contract.
